MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aaron Leone, Defendant in pro per and opposing party, (415-297-0121).
No appearance by Plaintiff and moving party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS IMPAC COMPANIES and BANK OF AMERICAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 2, 2013. Moving party's counsel, Brian Cave, LLP, C, Scott Greene, Bahareh Mostajelean and Gerald Richelson are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later that September 13, 2013. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: TIFFANY NORMAN, ESQ., 415.823.4566, ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF AARON LEONE; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS TIFFANY NORMAN, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF AARON LEONE. (Prevailing party to prepare aN ORDER USING MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNSEL FORM.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
